Articles (CMS)
GET /api/v1/articles GET /api/v1/articles/slug/{slug} GET /api/v1/articles/{id} POST /api/v1/articles PATCH /api/v1/articles/{id} DELETE /api/v1/articles/{id} POST /api/v1/articles/{id}/restore

GET /api/v1/artifacts POST /api/v1/artifacts GET /api/v1/artifacts/{id} PATCH /api/v1/artifacts/{id} DELETE /api/v1/artifacts/{id} POST /api/v1/artifacts/{id}/restore POST /api/v1/artifacts/{id}/image

GET /api/v1/museum PATCH /api/v1/museum DELETE /api/v1/museum POST /api/v1/museum/image POST /api/v1/museum/select

📋 Overview

API untuk Museum Digital Indonesia - Single Museum Pattern

🚀 REST API

API untuk Museum Digital Indonesia - Single Museum Pattern

📚 Multiple Endpoints

Comprehensive API endpoints for all your needs

📖 Interactive Docs

Test API directly from this documentation

🔐 Secure Auth

Bearer JWT, API Key authentication support

Base URL

Constraints

  • One Organization = One Museum (satu org hanya bisa punya satu museum)
  • JWT token (dari Bearer atau X-API-Key exchange) wajib ada organization_id
  • File upload harus melalui Media Service
  • X-API-Key akan di-exchange menjadi JWT dengan expiry 1 jam (3600 detik)
  • JWT hasil exchange di-cache di backend untuk mengurangi pemanggilan ke Account Service

🚀 REST API

Museum Service API menggunakan arsitektur RESTful. Semua komunikasi dilakukan melalui HTTP request dengan response format JSON.

Base URL: Semua endpoint diakses melalui base URL yang bisa dipilih (Production / Staging / Local).

HTTP Methods:

  • GET — Membaca data
  • POST — Membuat data baru atau melakukan aksi
  • PATCH — Update sebagian data
  • DELETE — Menghapus data

Response Format: Semua response menggunakan format JSON. Response berhasil mengembalikan data yang diminta, sedangkan error mengembalikan object dengan pesan error.

Status Codes:

  • 200 OK — Request berhasil
  • 201 Created — Data berhasil dibuat
  • 400 Bad Request — Parameter tidak valid
  • 401 Unauthorized — Auth token tidak valid atau tidak ada
  • 403 Forbidden — Tidak punya permission
  • 404 Not Found — Resource tidak ditemukan
  • 500 Internal Server Error — Error di server

📚 Multiple Endpoints

API menyediakan endpoint-endpoint untuk mengelola semua resource Museum Digital:

Museum:

  • Get, Update, Delete museum milik organization
  • Update museum image

Artifacts:

  • List artifacts (public/authenticated)
  • Create, Get, Update, Delete artifact
  • Update artifact image dan 3D model

Articles (CMS):

  • List articles dengan filter dan pagination
  • Get article by slug (public) atau by ID
  • Create, Update, Delete, Restore article

File Upload:

  • Upload via Media Service (terpisah)
  • Simpan URL ke museum/artifact

📖 Interactive Docs

Dokumentasi ini dilengkapi dengan API Tester built-in di setiap endpoint.

Cara menggunakan: 1. Klik endpoint yang ingin di-test di sidebar 2. Klik tombol "Try It" di bawah detail endpoint 3. Pilih metode autentikasi (JWT Bearer / API Key / Public) 4. Edit request body jika diperlukan 5. Klik "Send" untuk mengirim request

Fitur:

  • Pilih environment (Production / Staging / Local)
  • Request body pre-filled dari example
  • Response dengan syntax highlighting
  • Status code indicator (success/error)

Credentials: Simpan token di halaman "Credentials" — tersimpan per environment di browser localStorage.

🔐 Secure Auth

Semua endpoint yang membutuhkan autentikasi bisa menggunakan salah satu metode:

1. Bearer JWT

  • Login ke Account Service untuk mendapatkan JWT token
  • Kirim via header: Authorization: Bearer <token>
  • Token berisi: account_id, organization_id, permissions

2. API Key

  • Dapatkan API Key dari Account Service
  • Kirim via header: X-API-Key: <api_key>
  • Backend otomatis exchange API Key ke JWT (cached 1 jam)
  • Cocok untuk service-to-service, CLI, atau background jobs

Permissions: Setiap endpoint dilindungi oleh permission tertentu (misal: museum:write, artifact:delete). Permission tersemat di dalam JWT token.

🔄 Bearer JWT Authentication Flow

Step-by-step authentication menggunakan Bearer JWT

1
Login ke Account Service ▾

Autentikasi menggunakan email/password ke Account Service. Response berisi JWT token yang berisi account_id, organization_id, dan permissions.

2
Simpan token ▾

Simpan JWT token di localStorage browser atau secure storage di aplikasi client.

3
Kirim token di setiap request ▾

Tambahkan header Authorization: Bearer <token> di setiap API request yang membutuhkan autentikasi.

4
Museum di-identifikasi dari JWT ▾

org_id yang ada di JWT token digunakan untuk mengidentifikasi museum. Tidak perlu museum_id di URL path.

Semua endpoint yang membutuhkan autentikasi bisa menggunakan salah satu metode (JWT atau X-API-Key)

🔄 API Key Authentication Flow

Step-by-step authentication menggunakan API Key

1
Dapatkan API Key ▾

Minta API Key dari Account Service. Biasanya digunakan untuk service-to-service, CLI, atau background jobs.

2
Kirim API Key di setiap request ▾

Tambahkan header X-API-Key: <api_key> di setiap API request.

3
Backend exchange API Key ke JWT ▾

Backend otomatis exchange API Key menjadi JWT dengan caching 1 jam (3600 detik) untuk mengurangi pemanggilan ke Account Service.

4
JWT digunakan untuk autentikasi ▾

JWT hasil exchange digunakan sama seperti Bearer JWT biasa untuk autentikasi dan otorisasi endpoint.

Semua endpoint yang membutuhkan autentikasi bisa menggunakan salah satu metode (JWT atau X-API-Key)

🔄 Service Flow Diagram

Visualisasi alur data antara services

Articles (CMS) List Articles
GET /api/v1/articles

List semua artikel dengan filter dan pagination

🔓 Optional Auth (Public available)

Query Parameters

ParamTypeRequiredDescription
page integer optional Halaman ke- (default: 1)
page_size integer optional Jumlah item per halaman (default: 12)
museum_id string (uuid) optional Filter berdasarkan museum
type string optional Filter berdasarkan tipe (news, artifact_detail)
search string optional Cari berdasarkan judul/konten
is_published boolean optional Filter berdasarkan status publish
include_deleted boolean optional Sertakan artikel yang sudah dihapus (admin only) (default: false)
Example Response
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "art-123",
      "museum_id": "museum-456",
      "user_id": "user-789",
      "type": "news",
      "title": "Pameran Baru Dibuka",
      "slug": "pameran-baru-dibuka-1709523456",
      "excerpt": "Kami dengan bangga mengumumkan...",
      "content_html": "<h1>Pameran Baru</h1><p>Kami dengan bangga...</p>",
      "cover_image": "https://media.museumdigi.id/media/art123/cover.jpg",
      "is_published": true,
      "published_at": "2024-03-15T10:00:00Z",
      "created_at": "2024-03-10T08:00:00Z",
      "updated_at": "2024-03-15T09:00:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "page_size": 12,
    "total": 1,
    "total_pages": 1
  }
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Articles (CMS) Get Article by Slug (Public)
GET /api/v1/articles/slug/{slug}

Ambil artikel by slug (untuk akses publik)

🔓 Optional Auth (Public available)

Note: Hanya mengembalikan artikel yang sudah dipublish

Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Articles (CMS) Get Article by ID
GET /api/v1/articles/{id}

Ambil detail artikel by ID

🔓 Optional Auth (Public available)
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Articles (CMS) Create Article
POST /api/v1/articles

Buat artikel baru

🔒 Auth Required article:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
museum_id string (uuid) required ID museum pemilik
type string required Tipe artikel enum: news, artifact_detail
artifact_id string (uuid) optional Wajib jika type = artifact_detail
title string required Judul artikel max 255
slug string optional URL slug (auto-generate jika kosong) max 255
content string (markdown) required Konten artikel dalam format Markdown
cover_image string optional URL cover image dari Media Service
is_published boolean optional Status publish default: false
Example Request Body
{
  "museum_id": "f6c857ea-5428-427f-b7bb-a19bfaeff6cf",
  "type": "news",
  "title": "Pameran Sejarah Indonesia 2024",
  "content": "# Pameran Sejarah Indonesia\n\nKami dengan **bangga** mengumumkan...",
  "cover_image": "https://media.museumdigi.id/media/art123/cover.jpg",
  "is_published": true
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Articles (CMS) Update Article
PATCH /api/v1/articles/{id}

Update data artikel

🔒 Auth Required article:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
type string optional enum: news, artifact_detail
artifact_id string (uuid) optional
title string optional max 255
slug string optional max 255
content string (markdown) optional
cover_image string optional
is_published boolean optional

Note: Field yang tidak diisi tidak akan diupdate

Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Articles (CMS) Delete Article
DELETE /api/v1/articles/{id}

Soft-delete artikel

🔒 Auth Required article:delete
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Articles (CMS) Restore Article
POST /api/v1/articles/{id}/restore

Restore artikel yang sudah dihapus

🔒 Auth Required article:write
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts List Artifacts
GET /api/v1/artifacts

List semua artifact (public) atau filter by org (authenticated)

🔓 Optional Auth (Public available)

Query Parameters

ParamTypeRequiredDescription
page integer optional Halaman ke- (default: 1)
page_size integer optional Jumlah item per halaman (default: 9)
search string optional Cari berdasarkan nama/description
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts Create Artifact
POST /api/v1/artifacts

Buat artifact baru

🔒 Auth Required artifact:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
museum_id string (uuid) required ID museum pemilik
name string required Nama artifact
description string optional
category string optional ex: historical
era string optional ex: ancient
origin string optional ex: Indonesia
status string optional ex: active
image_media_id string (uuid) optional Media ID dari Media Service
model3d_media_id string (uuid) optional Media ID 3D model dari Media Service
Example Request Body
{
  "museum_id": "f6c857ea-5428-427f-b7bb-a19bfaeff6cf",
  "name": "Candi Borobudur Miniature",
  "description": "Miniatur candi skala 1:100",
  "category": "historical",
  "era": "Modern",
  "origin": "Indonesia",
  "status": "active",
  "image_media_id": "abc123-def456",
  "model3d_media_id": "3dmodel-uuid-789"
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts Get Artifact
GET /api/v1/artifacts/{id}

Ambil detail artifact by ID

🔓 Optional Auth (Public available)
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts Update Artifact
PATCH /api/v1/artifacts/{id}

Update data artifact

🔒 Auth Required artifact:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
name string optional
description string optional
image_media_id string (uuid) optional
model3d_media_id string (uuid) optional
Example Request Body
{
  "name": "Artifact Updated",
  "description": "Updated description",
  "image_media_id": "abc456-def789"
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts Delete Artifact
DELETE /api/v1/artifacts/{id}

Hapus artifact

🔒 Auth Required artifact:delete
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts Restore Artifact
POST /api/v1/artifacts/{id}/restore

Restore artifact yang sudah di-soft-delete

🔒 Auth Required artifact:write
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
Artifacts Update Artifact Image
POST /api/v1/artifacts/{id}/image

Update image artifact menggunakan media_id dari Media Service

🔒 Auth Required artifact:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
image_media_id string (uuid) required Media ID dari Media Service
Example Request Body
{
  "image_media_id": "xyz789-abc123"
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
My Museum (Single Museum Pattern) Get My Museum
GET /api/v1/museum

Ambil data museum.

  • Jika authenticated: return museum milik organization dari JWT org_id
  • Jika tidak authenticated (public): return museum yang dipilih admin (is_selected = true)
🔓 Optional Auth (Public available)

Museum object (authenticated) atau list of selected museums (public)

Example Response (authenticated)
{
  "id": "f6c857ea-5428-427f-b7bb-a19bfaeff6cf",
  "organization_id": "d6450e6c-c4ea-4e9f-a4d3-c9cf0c755d6a",
  "name": "Museum Gangelang",
  "location": "Bali",
  "description": "Museum untuk organisasi ini",
  "image_media_id": "abc123-def456",
  "contact_info": "",
  "artifact_count": 0,
  "is_selected": true,
  "lat_lng": { "lat": -8.5, "lng": 115.2 },
  "created_at": "2026-03-02T16:09:02+07:00",
  "updated_at": "2026-03-02T16:09:02+07:00"
}
Example Response (public)
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "f6c857ea-5428-427f-b7bb-a19bfaeff6cf",
      "organization_id": "d6450e6c-c4ea-4e9f-a4d3-c9cf0c755d6a",
      "name": "Museum Gangelang",
      "location": "Bali",
      "description": "Museum untuk organisasi ini",
      "image_media_id": "abc123-def456",
      "contact_info": "",
      "artifact_count": 5,
      "is_selected": true,
      "lat_lng": { "lat": -8.5, "lng": 115.2 },
      "created_at": "2026-03-02T16:09:02+07:00",
      "updated_at": "2026-03-02T16:09:02+07:00"
    }
  ],
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "page_size": 2,
    "total": 2
  }
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
My Museum (Single Museum Pattern) Update My Museum
PATCH /api/v1/museum

Update data museum milik organization

🔒 Auth Required museum:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
name string optional ex: Museum Gangelang Updated
location string optional ex: Jakarta Pusat
description string optional ex: Deskripsi museum yang diupdate
image_media_id string (uuid) optional Media ID dari Media Service ex: abc123-def456
contact_info string optional ex: +62 812-3456-7890
Example Request Body
{
  "name": "Museum Gangelang Updated",
  "location": "Bali",
  "description": "Updated description"
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
My Museum (Single Museum Pattern) Delete My Museum
DELETE /api/v1/museum

Hapus museum milik organization

🔒 Auth Required museum:delete
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
My Museum (Single Museum Pattern) Update Museum Image
POST /api/v1/museum/image

Update museum image menggunakan media_id dari Media Service

🔒 Auth Required museum:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
image_media_id string (uuid) required Media ID yang didapat dari response Media Service upload ex: abc123-def456
Example Request Body
{
  "image_media_id": "xyz789-abc123"
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...
My Museum (Single Museum Pattern) Select Museums (Public Display)
POST /api/v1/museum/select

Admin memilih museum mana saja yang tampil di GET /api/v1/museum (public). Bersifat replace — museum yang tidak ada di list akan otomatis di-unselect.

🔒 Auth Required museum:write

Request Body Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
museum_ids array of string (uuid) required Array museum ID yang ingin ditampilkan secara publik
Example Request Body
{
  "museum_ids": [
    "f6c857ea-5428-427f-b7bb-a19bfaeff6cf",
    "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
  ]
}
Example Response
{
  "message": "Selected museums updated successfully"
}
Response 
Click "Send" to see response...

📤 File Upload Flow

Museum Service tidak handle upload file langsung, menggunakan Media Service

Step 1: Upload ke Media Service

POST /api/v1/upload

Service: Media Service (bukan Museum Service)

Content-Type: multipart/form-data

Auth: Bearer JWT, X-API-Key

Fields

FieldTypeRequiredDescription
file binary required File yang mau diupload (image, 3D model, document)
folder_id string optional ID folder (optional)
cURL Example (JWT Bearer)
curl -X POST https://museumdigi.id/api/v1/upload \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer TOKEN" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F "file=@photo.jpg" \
  -F "folder_id=optional-folder-id"
cURL Example (API Key)
curl -X POST https://museumdigi.id/api/v1/upload \
  -H "X-API-Key: YOUR_API_KEY" \
  -H "Content-Type: multipart/form-data" \
  -F "file=@photo.jpg" \
  -F "folder_id=optional-folder-id"
Response Example
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "media_id": "abc123-def456",
    "url": "https://museumdigi.id/api/v1/media/abc123-def456",
    "thumbnail_url": "https://museumdigi.id/api/v1/media/abc123-def456?size=thumb"
  }
}

Step 2: Simpan media_id ke Museum/Artifact

Gunakan media_id (bukan URL) dari response Media Service. Frontend mengkonstruksi URL untuk menampilkan file: https://museumdigi.id/api/v1/media/{media_id}

Next Steps

Update museum image

Endpoint: POST /api/v1/museum/image → field image_media_id

Update artifact image

Endpoint: POST /api/v1/artifacts/{id}/image → field image_media_id

💡

Backend menyimpan media_id (UUID), bukan full URL. Untuk menampilkan file di frontend: https://museumdigi.id/api/v1/media/{media_id}

🔑 Login Screen

Halaman login untuk user masuk ke sistem

web mobile

API Calls

MethodEndpointPurposeTriggerAuth
POST /api/v1/auth/login Authenticate user dan dapatkan JWT token User tap Login button none
💡 Returns JWT token. Disimpan di localStorage untuk request selanjutnya.

🏛️ Museum Dashboard

Halaman utama museum setelah login, menampilkan info museum dan daftar artifact

web mobile

API Calls

MethodEndpointPurposeTriggerAuth
GET /api/v1/museum Load info museum (authenticated = milik org, public = selected museums) On page load optional
💡 Jika auth, return single museum. Jika public, return list of selected museums.
GET /api/v1/artifacts List artifacts dengan pagination On page load optional
💡 Public = semua artifact, authenticated = filtered by org
GET /api/v1/articles List artikel terbaru On page load / scroll optional

✏️ Edit Museum

Form edit data museum (nama, lokasi, deskripsi, image)

web

API Calls

MethodEndpointPurposeTriggerAuth
GET /api/v1/museum Load current museum data On page load required
PATCH /api/v1/museum Update museum data Submit form required
POST /api/v1/museum/image Update museum image User uploads new image required
💡 Kirim image_media_id (dari Media Service), bukan URL

🏺 Artifact Detail

Halaman detail artifact dengan gambar dan informasi lengkap

web mobile

API Calls

MethodEndpointPurposeTriggerAuth
GET /api/v1/artifacts/{id} Load artifact detail On page load optional

✏️ Create/Edit Artifact

Form buat atau edit artifact termasuk upload image

web

API Calls

MethodEndpointPurposeTriggerAuth
POST /api/v1/upload Upload artifact image ke Media Service User selects image file required
💡 Via Media Service, returns media_id
POST /api/v1/artifacts Create new artifact Submit form (create mode) required
PATCH /api/v1/artifacts/{id} Update existing artifact Submit form (edit mode) required

📰 Articles CMS

Kelola artikel dan berita museum (list, create, edit, delete)

web

API Calls

MethodEndpointPurposeTriggerAuth
GET /api/v1/articles List articles dengan filter dan pagination On page load optional
POST /api/v1/articles Create new article Submit create form required
PATCH /api/v1/articles/{id} Update article Submit edit form required
DELETE /api/v1/articles/{id} Soft-delete article Click delete button required
POST /api/v1/articles/{id}/restore Restore deleted article Click restore button required

🔐 Credentials

Konfigurasi credentials untuk testing API

Authorization: Bearer <value>
X-API-Key: <value>
💡 Info: Credentials tersimpan per environment di browser Anda (localStorage) dan tidak dikirim ke server.

Cara Menggunakan

1
Isi credentials di atas
2
Klik "Endpoints" di sidebar untuk memilih API
3
Klik "Try It" pada endpoint yang ingin di-test
4
Pilih metode autentikasi dan klik Send

🔐 Authentication

Methods and permissions for API access

Authentication Methods

Bearer JWT

Header: Authorization: Bearer <token>

Source: Account Service

Untuk user login yang sudah autentikasi

Token contains: account_id, organization_id, permissions

API Key

Header: X-API-Key: <api_key>

Source: Account Service (via token exchange)

Untuk service-to-service, CLI, atau background jobs

Note: Backend akan otomatis exchange API Key menjadi JWT dan cache hasilnya

Permissions

PermissionDescription
museum:read Baca museum
museum:write Create/update museum
museum:delete Delete museum
artifact:read Baca artifact
artifact:write Create/update artifact
artifact:delete Delete artifact
media:upload Upload file ke Media Service
media:download Download file dari Media Service

© 2026 Museum Service API. All rights reserved.

Swagger UI • OpenAPI JSON • 📥 YAML • 🤖 JSON
